description: §21.3 — importing from `./nope.scrml` with NO such sibling in the case dir fires E-IMPORT-006 (import target file does not exist on disk).
rationale: §21.3: a relative import must resolve to a real module. No `nope.scrml` is written alongside the entry (no `files` fixture), so the path does not resolve and the compiler rejects it E-IMPORT-006.
